images.caption: Figure 1:The autoregressive MTP drafter (blue blocks on the right) is fed activations and KV cache from the main model (gray blocks).

Figure 2:Image resizing. Here we usepatch_size=16,pooling_kernel_size=3,max_soft_tokens=10.
The image is thus first resized to 2×\times4 pooled patches (each of size48​px248\text{px}^{2}), which is the closest match that results in a sequence length below the targeted 10. The 72 patches (each of size16​px216\text{px}^{2}) are then processed by the vision encoder, the vision encoder representations are pooled3×33\times 3, and the resulting 8 soft tokens are processed by the LLM backbone.
